description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Autorelease that runs on push to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: dev-release on windows-latest and build-macos on a matrix of macos-13 and macos-latest. The dev-release job sets up WSL, configures Git, checks out a specific repository, builds the project, generates an NSIS installer, and uploads assets to a development release. The build-macos job installs dependencies with Homebrew, builds the project, and uploads assets to a development release.
